message:
feat(cli,server): expand CLI search commands, improve TUI analytics, and update configs

CLI (mcp-agent-mail-cli/lib.rs):
- Add new CLI subcommands for the decomposed search modules:
  query assistance explain, search cache stats, and search
  consistency verification commands
- Wire new search service methods to CLI interface

Server improvements:
- cleanup.rs: improve cleanup scheduling with search index
  maintenance integration
- tool_metrics.rs: add search-specific metric counters for
  cache hit/miss rates, query latency percentiles, and
  rerank effectiveness
- tui_bridge.rs: add 132 lines of TUI bridge code for new
  search analytics panels and real-time search metrics display
- tui_screens/analytics.rs: simplify analytics rendering by
  delegating to new metric counters
- tui_screens/search.rs: integrate with decomposed search
  modules for live search preview
- tui_screens/threads.rs: improve thread rendering with
  search result highlighting

Config updates:
- Cargo.lock: dependency additions for search modules
- codex.mcp.json, cursor.mcp.json, gemini.mcp.json: update
  MCP configuration for search-aware tool registration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
